flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Bethel University fell 47% between 2021 and 2024 (26.1% → 13.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 37% at Bethel University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.7k vs 2.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bethel University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
